title: Norwegian Crispy Hash
description: A traditional Norwegian dish made with crispy hash and crumbly breadcrumbs, perfect for a quick breakfast.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine crispy hash, crumbly norwegian cheese, and breadcrumbs.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together egg and milk.
3. Add the egg mixture to the hash mixture and mix well.
4. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
5. Divide the mixture into 4 equal parts and shape each part into a patty.
6. Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
7. Add the patties to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
